rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Walk-away test (M2+).
50% magic rule (M3-M8).
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Cross-module magic-distribution rule; not judgeable from one M6 closer exercise in isolation.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Trust the agentic design - no human backstops.
Quality ladder.
One exercise = one bounded activity.
Modules composable across variants.
Three-level completeness.
Pattern-recognition LOs need n>=2 instances with contrast.
Progression-with-variations is the spine.
Student agency - adults decide.
Delegation - student brings, Claude screens.
Split mega-exercise when phases = distinct skills + distinct artifacts.
Artifact-realism check.
Teach principle + technique - default.
Auto-fire sim+eval after significant rewrite.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Process rule for the authoring cycle, not a property of the file body; Quality block shows sim grandfathered, not a body defect.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Forcing functions stay, scripted reactions go.
Corporate infra = nice-to-have, never forcing function.
Personal-first, team promotion via human conversation.
Measure silent failure, not just friction.
Don't pre-set categories before experiment runs.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Generation-process rule about not pre-spec'ing eval categories; not a property of a student-facing exercise body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Verification layers sample DIFFERENT error distributions.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Internal verification-architecture rule for the build, not for the in-seat student exercise.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Cheap-before-expensive verification ordering.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Internal verification-spend ordering rule for the build; not a property of this exercise body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Rule in memory without forcing function = worse than no rule.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Authoring-process rule about memory/forcing-function pairing; not judgeable from this file body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Short skeptical pushback on "done" = re-verify trigger.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Agent-self-discipline meta-rule for the generation orchestrator; no surface in this exercise body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Cohort execution is trainer-paced + concurrent, not sequential.
Host-skill optional; maintainer blocks trainer-only.
Reflection beats: in-chat over file-write.
Classroom = default delivery; body teaches work, trainer manages room.
Eval = fixed yardstick; thing measured learns.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Eval-loop integrity rule for the build harness; no scorer-loop in this exercise.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Reading burden for verification = banned. Claude audits Claude.
Self-report + self-audit charity - verify at artifact, over-flag or fresh-session.
Offered structures need forced-engagement mechanic.
Source-type blindness on ingestion.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Heterogeneous-source/slide-extraction rule; this read is over the student's own git-tracked text artefacts, no decks.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Task selection drives outcome - name floor AND ceiling.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No task-selection step here; the artefact set is the fixed prior-modules output, not a student-picked scope.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Maintainer-block hedge naming section's own failure mode = cut-signal.
Audience tier determines authoring substrate.
Verification machinery needs smoke-test before trust.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: About smoke-testing built verification machinery (hooks/judges/loops); no such machinery is built in this exercise.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Context-loading tiers as staged progression.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Context-tier reveal rule for earlier modules; this M6 closer does not teach a new context-loading tier.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Removals are strategic - ask before cutting.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Generation-step discipline about cutting entities; not a property of the finished file body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Symmetric visible-mechanics > runtime fork when dual-runtime constraints break agentic move.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Dual-runtime fork-vs-symmetric rule; AE101 is CLI/Desktop single-track here and prompt is tagged Claude Code, no runtime fork present.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Load-bearing platform feature = no fallback. Gate or redesign.
Eval architecture - partition by evidence source, not criterion count.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Judge/eval-architecture rule for the eval system, not for the student exercise.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Plug points + UX.
Per-exercise leap test - 3 observable Monday outcomes.
rules_evaluated.evidence: L49-76 maintainer block carries Failure modes, Watch-fors, Decision points, but no leap-test section naming 3 observable Monday outcomes (and arc-mood carve-out artifact framing not present).
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Maintainer block lacks the per-exercise leap test; add 3 observable next-day outcomes (M6 arc-mood carve-out: name the saved arc-note artifact the student now owns and re-reads when a long task stalls).

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Per-phase failure mode + escape hatch.
Heavy fan-out prompts get body recovery callout.
Save belongs with authoring, not loading.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No create-then-use pairing across exercises here; the note is authored and saved within this single exercise.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Convenience-driven prompts with known shape-bias -> body acknowledgment callout.
Deliberate-antipattern prompts = class-judge exempt, flagged-by-design.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No deliberate-antipattern prompt here; the single prompt is a genuine teaching forcing function, not a flagged-by-design baseline.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Session widget - place by learning flow.
Widgets carry semantics, not just emphasis.
Pre-action framing doesn't preview prompt's payoff.
Engineer-audience audit fixes default to body callout, not forcing function.
Multi-session (any new mechanic mid-arc) ships as packaging, not new primitive.
/clear = tool, not ceremony.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Close-protocol /clear rule; this exercise continues the M5/M6 session by design and prescribes no /clear ceremony.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Inbound links preserve pedagogical beat across reference restructuring.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No reference-page restructuring in scope; cross-doc link beat preservation is not exercised here.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Scan at the unit the rule names, not convenient larger one.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Auditor-discipline rule about scan granularity; not a property of the file body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Verify mechanism before proposing surgery.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Pre-mechanism-change discipline rule for the orchestrator; no skill/framework surgery proposed in this exercise.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Callouts next to prompts: steer, don't pre-empt.
Persistent TODO surfaces stale by default - audit before acting.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Punchlist-staleness discipline for the orchestrator; the file only points at pre-cohort-todos.md, it does not act on it.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Maintainer blocks point, don't restate. Link architecture doc where they touch delivery.
rules_evaluated.evidence: L13 body + L43/L59 maintainer block name delivery mechanics (continues in M5 worktree, same session, sub-task isolation, save destination) without a one-line pointer to training-architecture.md section per Rule B.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Where the body/maintainer block references session-continuation, worktree, and sub-task delivery mechanics, add a one-line pointer to the AE101 training-architecture.md section rather than relying on inline restatement.
